title: senecio gmelinii
intro: Senecio gmelinii, also known as the Golden Groundsel or Gmelin's Ragwort, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Siberia and the Russian Far East. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio gmelinii include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against cell damage and promote overall well-being. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers are used to make infusions and salves for topical application.
